meta.description: Query your own activity log. Returns your recent decisions, trades, and failures. Auto-scoped to your agent ID.
View your own performance metrics: Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar, win rates, drawdown, P&L, tier. Use to self-assess before calling suggest_change.
Suggest a change to your own configuration. The General reviews pending suggestions during pulse. Categories: capital, venue, chain, strategy, parameter, general.

category.description: Category: capital, venue, chain, strategy, parameter, general

meta.description: Macro/economic signals: NFP, CPI, GDP, retail sales, FOMC. Schedule, sources, extraction.

action.description: signals, schedule, sources, or extract (default: signals)

hours_ahead.description: Hours to look ahead for schedule (default 72)

meta.description: Get all open trading positions across all agents.
Live system state: service health, wallets, LLM providers, chains, tool registry stats.
Dispatch a prompt to any configured LLM provider. Use cheaper models for sub-tasks like analysis, summarization, or code generation. Check list_providers for available models.

provider_id.description: LLM provider ID (use list_providers or get_system_state to find IDs)

prompt.description: The prompt/task to send to the LLM

system_prompt.description: System prompt for the sub-call (optional, default: general assistant)

meta.description: Send tokens from an agent wallet to a destination address. Use route_quote first to check costs. Use list_wallets for wallet IDs.

wallet_id.description: Agent wallet ID to send from (use list_wallets to find IDs)

amount.description: Amount in smallest unit (hex wei for EVM)

chain.description: Chain to send on: ethereum, arbitrum, base

meta.description: Get cost-ranked routes for moving an asset: send, swap, bridge, THORChain. Returns route options with cost_usd and time estimates.

asset.description: Token symbol: USDC, ETH, BTC, etc.

src_chain.description: Source chain: ethereum, arbitrum, base, bitcoin, solana, xrp

meta.description: Add a standing directive that persists across sessions and influences automated pulses.
Add an economic data source for monitoring government releases.

parse_rule.description: Parse rule for extracting the number

meta.description: Add a price data feed for a token. Use before add_watchlist to ensure data sources exist.

source_id.description: Source-specific ID (CoinGecko slug, Binance pair, Chainlink contract)

chain_id.description: EVM chain ID for Chainlink feeds (default 0)

meta.description: Add a token to the market watchlist. Requires at least one market_feed entry for the symbol.
Manage which tools a trade agent can use. Use 'list' to see current assignments, 'add'/'remove' to modify, 'set' to replace entirely. Use search_tools to discover available tool names.

action.description: add, remove, set, or list. 'set' replaces all assignments; 'add'/'remove' modify incrementally.

tools.description: Tool names to add/remove/set (not needed for list)

meta.description: Execute any registered tool by name. Use search_tools first to discover available tools and their parameter schemas.

arguments.description: Tool arguments as JSON (see search_tools for parameter schemas)

meta.description: On-chain reads: token/ETH balance, gas price, or Aave v3 account data.
Clone an existing agent for A/B testing. Creates a paused copy with a new wallet. Does NOT auto-fund — you must allocate capital separately. Use to test prompt variants.

variant_prompt.description: Modified prompt for the clone (optional — uses original if omitted)

reason.description: Why this clone is being created

meta.description: Create an autonomous trade agent with its own wallet. Agent starts paused — fund the returned ETH address, then activate with set_agent_status. Use assign_agent_tools to customize which tools the agent can access.

prompt.description: System prompt defining the agent's trading strategy and decision rules

provider_id.description: LLM provider ID for the agent (use list_providers to find IDs)

max_capital.description: Maximum capital per action in USD (0 = system default)

meta.description: Create a new agent wallet with auto-generated passphrase. Returns wallet ID and ETH address. Fund the address to give the wallet capital.

Permanently remove an agent record. Agent must be paused or stopped first. Use dissolve_agent first to sweep funds, then delete_agent to clean up. The agent wallet row in wallets is preserved (marked idle) for audit trail.
Database schema introspection. Returns CREATE TABLE statements.
Stop an agent and sweep all funds to a destination. Uses profit_take registry entries (protocol='profit_take', chain_id=0, role=address/token/chain) as defaults.

destination.description: Destination address for swept funds (optional — defaults to profit_take/address in registry)

token.description: Token to sweep, e.g. USDC or ETH (optional — defaults to profit_take/token in registry)

chain.description: Chain to sweep on (optional — defaults to profit_take/chain in registry)

meta.description: Query the unified activity log. Returns recent activity with optional filters by actor, category, action, status. Use for operational review, debugging, and reports.

actor.description: Filter by actor: user:1, general, agent:3 (optional)

category.description: Filter by category: trade, tool_call, decision, script, pulse, crud, auth (optional)

status.description: Filter by status: ok, failed, partial (optional)

meta.description: Aggregated activity summary: counts and failure rates grouped by action. Use for policy decisions and identifying problem areas.

actor.description: Filter by actor (optional — omit for all actors)

meta.description: Full performance metrics for a single agent: Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar, max drawdown, profit factor, win rates (lifetime + rolling 7/30/90d), efficiency, diversification, performance tier, plus recent history snapshots for trend analysis.
List agent recommendations. Agents self-assess via suggest_change — review pending ones each pulse and accept/reject them.

status.description: Filter by status: pending, accepted, rejected, expired (default: pending)

meta.description: Get LLM cost breakdown by player and summary (scout vs capital).
Cross-chain intelligence: compare gas costs, find cheapest chain, get bridge quotes.
Get all standing directives (active and inactive).
Recent failures across all actors. Use to diagnose issues and prioritize fixes.
Get GMX V2 market info for a token.
Get system overview: General config, all trade agents with strategies and status.
Retrieve lessons learned. Use to review accumulated knowledge and identify patterns.
Market data: current prices (all tokens), technical indicators (RSI/EMA/MACD/Bollinger/ATR/VWAP), or OHLCV candles.
Real-time mempool intelligence: large pending swaps, whale transfers, Aave activity.
On-chain options via Premia v3: strikes, IV surface, option premiums for ETH/BTC/LINK.

is_call.description: true for calls, false for puts

strike.description: Strike price as hex (64x64 fixed point)

meta.description: Portfolio-level summary: total capital deployed, portfolio P&L, average Sharpe, max drawdown, concentration (HHI), top-3 and bottom-3 agents by calmar, risk gate status, and recent risk events. Use for strategic reviews.
Get recent General pulse logs with metrics, actions, and reasoning.

System-wide risk status: portfolio drawdown vs threshold, circuit breaker state, per-agent gate details (drawdown, gas churn, daily loss, idle, min viable), cooldown timers, and recent risk gate events from the last 24 hours.
THORChain info: pool depth/liquidity or inbound vault addresses. Use route_quote for swap quotes.

asset.description: Pool asset for pools action (e.g. BTC.BTC)

meta.description: On-chain balance check for all wallets (personal + agent). Returns native token and ERC-20 balances across all configured chains. Use this first when asked about assets, net worth, or holdings.

wallet_id.description: Optional: check a specific personal wallet ID only

meta.description: List available xStock (tokenized equities) and RWA tokens with contract addresses.

type.description: Filter: xstock, rwa, or all (default: all)

meta.description: Compare supply APY across Aave v3, Morpho Blue vaults, and Pendle PT markets.
List all configured LLM providers with their models and status.
List all agent wallets with addresses and status.

Read-only SQL query. Tables: ta_general, ta_pulse_log, ta_llm_costs, trade_agents, agent_decisions, agent_positions, market_feeds, watchlist, price_cache, indicators, econ_sources, econ_signals, config, registry, accounts, wallets, general_directives, general_sessions, general_tools, agent_wallets.
Leaderboard: rank agents by any performance metric. Returns sorted list with key metrics.

by.description: Metric to rank by: calmar, sharpe, win_rate, total_pnl, pnl_pct (default: calmar)

meta.description: Read system documentation. Returns markdown content up to 32KB.

topic.description: Topic: plan, architecture, tradeagents, help, build

meta.description: Log a structured intervention record. Call BEFORE or AFTER modifying an agent via write_db/set_config. Captures metrics snapshot automatically. Enables statistical validation of changes over time.

intervention_type.description: Type: prompt_change, capital_adjust, pause, resume, dissolve, clone, parameter_change

field_changed.description: Which field: default_prompt, max_capital, status, etc. (optional)

regime.description: Market regime: high_vol, low_vol, bull, bear, range (optional)

meta.description: Record a lesson learned from intervention review or meta-analysis. High-confidence validated lessons get injected into future pulse context.

category.description: Category: prompt_strategy, capital_allocation, risk_management, chain_selection, regime

confidence.description: Confidence 0.0-1.0 based on sample size and statistical significance

meta.description: Deactivate a standing directive.
Accept or reject an agent recommendation. If accepted, you must still apply the change yourself (e.g. via write_db or set_config).

One-call portfolio dashboard: all active agent metrics (tier, Sharpe, Calmar, win rate, drawdown, P&L), pending recommendations, recent risk events, capital allocation (total deployed, per-agent share, idle). Use each pulse for strategic oversight.
Review past interventions with before/after metric deltas, z-scores, and outcome classifications. Use to evaluate which changes worked and refine management strategy.

Execute a unified router route for an AGENT wallet (signing via agent_wallets). Currently supports route_type=aave_withdraw only — withdraws supplied tokens from Aave v3 to the wallet. After funds are in the wallet, use route_execute to send USDC to profit_take or another address. Use route_quote first to confirm aave_withdraw is available for asset/chain.

route_type.description: Must be aave_withdraw to pull Aave v3 supply back to the agent wallet on src_chain

wallet_id.description: Agent wallet ID from list_wallets (same as route_execute)

amount.description: Human amount (e.g. 112.47) or hex 0x... raw units

extra.description: Optional; merged with agent_wallet_id for router (slippage etc. if extended later)

meta.description: Execute a shell command on the host. Output captured and logged.
Save a new script-based tool to the registry. It becomes callable via call_tool. Scripts run sandboxed with timeout and output capture.

command.description: Shell command. Use ${param_name} for argument substitution.

meta.description: Opportunity scanner: cross-DEX arb, Aave liquidations, or stablecoin spread arb.

account.description: Specific account to check for liquidation

meta.description: Search the tool registry for available tools. Returns names, descriptions, parameter schemas, and categories. Use before call_tool to discover tools.

category.description: Filter by category: read, hierarchy, data, directive, write, automation, custom

meta.description: Change a trade agent's status. Use 'active' to start polling, 'paused' to temporarily halt, 'stopped' to permanently disable.

status.description: New status: active, paused, or stopped

meta.description: Set a system configuration value. Cannot modify auth/security keys.

Project capital allocation under a strategy. half_kelly uses win rates and avg win/loss ratios for Kelly fractions (halved for safety). risk_parity allocates inversely to volatility. Returns current vs proposed allocations — no execution.
Immediately run a full General reinforcement pulse.
Modify your own system prompt. Changes how you think and respond.
Mark a lesson as validated after confirming it with subsequent data. Validated lessons are injected into pulse context for compounding knowledge.
Write SQL on whitelisted tables: market_feeds, watchlist, econ_sources, ta_strategies, config, general_directives.
